### Validation Checklist (do not remove)

### Reproducibility Checklist (do not remove)
- [ ] Random seeds or seed strategy are documented.
- [ ] Workflow (pre-processing, pre-solver, optimization, post-processing) is documented.
- [ ] Software/hardware versions and environment details are documented.
- [ ] Any deviations or caveats are documented.
